title: EU leaders to hold talks on common budget at Brussels summit as battle for cash begins
content: EU governments will hold substantial negotiations on how to allocate €2 trillion of the European common budget over the next seven years, pitting frugals calling for cuts against member states defending money for agriculture to be preserved in tough talks ahead.

title: Ukraine deserves fast EU membership ‘more than any other country,’ Zelenskyy says

title: An EU of six, not 27, best way to 'reinforce Europe', Bruno Le Maire tells Euronews
